welcome: Welcome to The Maitre D'. The doors are open.
stormQueue: {{count}} guest(s) stormed out of the queue!
nextGuest: Next guest stepped up to the podium.
doorsClosedQueue: Remaining guests in queue sent away — doors closed.
doorsClosedOvertime: 22:30 — Doors closed. Waiting for the last tables to clear.
frustratedRepeat: Client is frustrated. You already asked that.
accuseReservation: I don't think you have a reservation at all.
accuseSize: You're bringing more people than you booked for!
accuseTime: You're far too late for your reservation.
accuseCaughtResponse: You caught me... I didn't think you'd notice. *sweats*
accuseFalseResponse: I'm telling the truth! This is insulting!
logCaughtLie: CAUGHT IN A LIE: You correctly called out their {{field}} lie!
logFalseAccusation: False Accusation: They weren't lying about {{field}}!
logCropped: CROPPED: Left {{count}} guest(s) behind. Rating penalty: {{penalty}}
logGratefulLiar: Grateful Liar: You caught them, but sat them anyway! Massive bonus.
logFooledScammer: FOOLED: You sat a scammer! They skipped the bill and left a mess.
logFooledOther: FOOLED: You sat a rule-breaker without calling them out. Staff is annoyed.
logJustifiedRefusal: Justified Refusal: You protected the house from a problematic guest.
logUnjustifiedRefusal: Unjustified Refusal: You turned away an honest guest!
logRefusedAfterSeating: Refused after seating: You accepted {{name}} then turned them away. Guests are furious.
logRushedTable: Rushed table — party asked to leave early.
logStormDesk: Client stormed out of the desk!
logStormFalseAccusation: Client stormed out after false accusation!
maitreGreeting: Good evening! How may I help you?
greetings.reservationWithName: Good evening. I have a reservation under {{lastName}}, party of {{partySize}}.
greetings.reservation: Good evening, I'm here for my table.
Hey, checking in for my booking.
greetings.scammer: I definitely have a reservation, I just forgot the time.
My name should be in there, I booked it weeks ago.
I'm a regular here, you must have my name.
greetings.walkin: Do you have any space for a walk-in?
We don't have a booking, but we're hoping for a table.
Any chance you can squeeze us in?
characters.the-syndicate.clueText: Watch out for the Pinstripes tonight.
characters.manu-macaroon.clueText: The President is coming. Navy suit, tiny espresso cup. He brings security.
characters.manu-macaroon.consequenceDesc: Workers strike! Queue patience drains at double speed.
characters.food-critic.clueText: A critic is dining incognito tonight. Seat them flawlessly.
characters.the-owner.clueText: The owner may drop in unannounced. Do NOT refuse them.
characters.the-inspector.clueText: Health inspector coming tonight. They arrive late — do not accuse them of a Time Crime.
characters.fake-hipster.consequenceDescr: The Fake Hipster skips the bill. -€80.
characters.fake-hipster.refusalDescripti: Good call — that one never pays.
characters.drunk-group.consequenceDescri: Rowdy crew all night. Staff morale tanks. -30 morale.
characters.small-spender.clueText: Orders tap water and shares a starter.
characters.small-spender.consequenceDesc: They order tap water and share a starter. -€30.
characters.small-spender.refusalDescript: Saved a table for a paying guest.
characters.fake-influencer.clueText: Posted a hit piece last time.
characters.fake-influencer.consequenceDe: Charmed a free meal, then posted a hit piece. -1.5 stars.
characters.fake-influencer.refusalDescri: No free meals, no hit pieces. Well handled.
characters.the-dictator.clueText: Extremely dangerous. Do not seat under any circumstances.
characters.the-dictator.consequenceDescr: Didn't like the food. Attacked the restaurant.
characters.the-dictator.refusalDescripti: Dictator turned away — catastrophic reputation damage avoided.
